chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-5487 / 2025 (Muhammad Shakeel Vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others) ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING 1) For hearing of CMA No. 22867/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. M/s. Aneel Zia & Saima Syed, Advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. M/s. Sardar Zafar Hussain & Tabinda Larik, Advocates for Respondent. ___________________ Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate appeared for the Respondent No.2 and by way of assistance to the Court states that the circumstances in this petition are similar to those in C. P. No. D-4011/2025 where this Court had disposed of the petition by order dated 18.08.2025 by directing the Collector to decide the Petitioner's application under Section 83-B of the Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel for the Petitioner does not object to disposal of this petition on same terms. Therefore, we dispose of this petition by directing the Respondent No. 2 to decide the Petitioner's application for release of goods under Section 83-B of the Customs Act, 1969 within four days J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
